name: Chun Yuan Steel Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Chun Yuan Steel Industry Co., Ltd. provides metal solutions primarily in Taiwan. It operates through seven divisions: Commercials Steel, Commercials Steel Regional, Electrical Steel, Special Steel, Special Steel Strip, Automated Storage System, and Construction. The company offers hot and cold rolled steel sheets and bar coils; enamel and coated steel sheets and bar coils; aluminum and alloy-aluminum sheets and coils; magnetic steel sheets comprising motor core EI sheets and magnetic steel coils; special steel materials, such as plate/bar/round/square/angled steel; cold rolled carbon bar steel coils; and copper products, including brass and phosphor bronze. It also provides steel base and reinforced plates; machinery products; steel structures; and H-beam steel and cellular H-beam steel products for welded structures. In addition, the company offers storage equipment, including logistics equipment, 3-D automated storage systems, and shelfs for heavy materials; castings, such as container angles; and stamping parts comprising autos and electric appliances parts. Further, it provides civil and construction engineering services for factory buildings, multi-storey buildings, and bridges. The company was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
